item.description: Weaver—the First Product in Credo’s OmniConnect Family—Overcomes Memory Bottlenecks in AI Inference Workloads to Boost Memory Density and Throughput SAN JOSE, Calif.--(BUSINESS WIRE)-- Credo ...

item.title: Credo Unveils Industry’s First Memory Fanout Gearbox for Scalable, High-Bandwidth AI Inference
item.description: Credo introduces Weaver, a memory fanout gearbox engineered to overcome the memory bottlenecks in AI inference workloads. The first product in Credo’s OmniConnect family, Weaver boosts memory ...
